summary: REQ-61 and REQ-62 appear to be implemented via tighter gap between image/text and reduced text leading (as described in the repo summary), and REQ-63 is partially implemented with a subtle, animated, non-interactive right-arrow indicator plus a Tailwind keyframe. However, the arrow indicator is explicitly hidden on small screens ("hidden md:block"), which may conflict with the requirement that the indicator be visible on common mobile and desktop breakpoints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Animated right-side arrow indicator should be visible within the carousel section on common mobile and desktop breakpoints, without overlapping content/controls and without causing horizontal overflow; decorative arrow should be accessible (aria-hidden or similar).
missing_requirements.reason: The arrow indicator is conditionally rendered only for md+ breakpoints ("hidden md:block"), so it will not be visible on mobile screens, which appears to fall short of the requirement for visibility on common mobile and desktop breakpoints.
